name: RPlog_Near_Capture_Escape_From_Tyy_sun
title: Near Capture: Escape from Tyy'sun
summary: In a park on Etti IV, the crime lord Tyy'sun, going by the name Eson, lures the warrior woman Ash to a bench via a note delivered by Twi'lek youths on hoverboards. The wretched, parch-skinned Twi'lek confronts her over her lover Tritus's abuses against one of the Family's own, the woman A'estshy Nubiari, dismissing news of a cease-fire. When Ash refuses to be cowed, Tyy'sun cooks a glop grenade and drops it at her feet, forcing her to dive away and draw her weapon as she flees. Tyy'sun watches her escape with a laugh, recognizing that Tritus's lover is a formidable foe.
